title: SPDR MSCI EAFE Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF (NYSEARCA:EFAX) Sees Significant Decrease in Short Interest
description: SPDR MSCI EAFE Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF (NYSEARCA:EFAX – Get Free Report) was the recipient of a significant drop in short interest during the month of June. As of June 15th, there was short interest totaling 7,125 shares, a drop of 65.5% from the May 31st total of 20,682 shares. Based on an average [...]

title: Utah Guard Choppers Snag Baby Dino Fossil From Grand Staircase Wilds
description: A nearly complete baby duck‐billed dinosaur encased in more than 1,100 pounds of rock was airlifted from Grand Staircase‐Escalante and will be prepared at the Natural History Museum of Utah.

title: See These Ancient Etruscan Frescoes That Italy Bought for Millions and Put on Public Display in Rome
description: Found in a burial chamber, the artworks depict battles between ancient heroes in the Mediterranean world

title: Deep in Rajasthan's desert, an ancient way of life still endures today
description: A remote village in India holds a 600-year-old tradition.
